title: HyperWhisper Universal Backup
description: Cross-platform backup format for HyperWhisper (macOS & Windows). Version 2 of the backup schema. Shared top-level objects are intentionally strict so schema validation catches accidental contract drift; future platform-specific or provider-specific data must live under platformExtensions or apiKeys, which remain open extension points.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Always 2 for the universal format.

exportDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the backup was created.

appVersion.description: App version that created the backup (e.g. '2.28.0').

platformExtensions.description: Platform-specific data. Keys are platform names (macos, windows). Preserve unknown keys for round-trip fidelity; this is the sanctioned escape hatch for platform-only fields rejected by strict shared objects. The macOS settings blob is category-keyed: platformExtensions.macos.settings.{audio,general,storage,advanced,shortcuts,aiModel}. Each platform also preserves the OTHER platform's per-mode platformExtensions slice across a round-trip.

Settings.description: App settings grouped by category. Only cross-platform settings are included at the top level. Platform-specific settings go into platformExtensions; unknown shared setting fields are rejected intentionally.

provider.description: Streaming transcription provider, for example 'hyperwhisperCloud', 'deepgram', 'elevenLabs', 'openAI', or 'xai'.

shortcut.description: Platform-specific persisted keyboard shortcut for starting or stopping streaming.

cloudTranscriptionModel.description: Cloud transcription model ID (HyperWhisper Cloud X-STT-Model; empty/null = provider default).

cloudTranscriptionDomain.description: Cloud transcription domain (HyperWhisper Cloud X-STT-Domain). Currently 'medical' or null.

localPostProcessingModel.description: Local LLM model ID for on-device post-processing.

geminiCustomPrompt.description: Custom transcription prompt for Gemini provider.

cloudAccuracyTier.description: HyperWhisper Cloud transcription tier, for example 'groqWhisper', 'deepgramNova3', 'elevenLabsScribeV2', 'grokStt', 'azureMaiTranscribe', or 'googleChirp3'.

cloudPostProcessingModel.description: HyperWhisper Cloud post-processing engine+model, stored as a provider-qualified key '<engineId>:<modelId>' sourced from shared-app-classification/cloud-pp-catalog.json (e.g. 'cerebras:gpt-oss-120b', 'groq:openai/gpt-oss-120b', 'anthropic:claude-haiku-4-5', 'grok:grok-4.3', 'openai:gpt-5-mini', 'gemini:gemini-2.5-flash', 'mistral:mistral-small-latest'). Legacy values 'cerebrasGptOss120B', 'groqGptOss120B', 'grokFast', 'claudeHaiku' are still accepted and migrated on import. Free-string field — no enum constraint.

platformExtensions.description: Platform-specific mode fields keyed by platform name (windows, macos). Each platform writes its own slice and PRESERVES the other platform's slice across a round-trip (persisted natively as foreignPlatformExtensions / ForeignPlatformExtensions). Preserve unknown keys.

source.description: Optional source marker, for example manual or auto-learn.

ApiKeys.description: API keys by lowercase provider name. Optional, opt-in on export. Unknown provider keys are allowed for forward compatibility and silently ignored on import if the app does not recognize them.

fireworks.description: Fireworks AI is no longer a supported provider. This field is retained only so older backups that still contain a Fireworks API key restore without error; new backups no longer write it.
